```{r, echo=FALSE, eval=F}
      ggplot2::xlab(go.type[[r]]) +
      ggplot2::ylab("Enrichment -log10 p-value") +
      ggplot2::labs(title=c("GO enrichment",go.type[[r]]),subtitle=levels(all.markers$cluster)[i])
    
    
    if(r==1)
    {topGO.cnidocyte.BP=topGO.cnidocyte}else if(r==2)
    {topGO.cnidocyte.CC=topGO.cnidocyte}else if (r==3)
    {topGO.cnidocyte.MF=topGO.cnidocyte}  
  }   
} 
save (topGO.cnidocyte.BP,topGO.cnidocyte.CC,topGO.cnidocyte.MF,file='topGO.cnidocyte.RData')

rm(GOdata.BP.cnidocyte,GOdata,
GOdata.MF.cnidocyte ,GOdata.CC.cnidocyte,
myInterestingGenes,
allRes_intgenes, topGO.cnidocyte)
}
```

evaluate the topGO results:
```{r, echo=FALSE, eval=T}
load(file='topGO.cnidocyte.RData')
for (i in 1:length(topGO.cnidocyte.BP))
  print(topGO.cnidocyte.BP[[i]]+
          topGO.cnidocyte.MF[[i]]&theme(title = element_text(size=6),axis.text.y = element_text(size=6)))
rm(topGO.cnidocyte.BP,topGO.cnidocyte.MF,topGO.cnidocyte.CC)
```

# Cnidocyte specification
```{r}
goi=c("SOX4-like-1","MYC-like-7",  "PRD13-like-1", "ZN431-like-1", 
 "COT2-like-1","FOSX-like-1", "AaJUN-like-2", 'FOS-like-4','AL-like-1',
"AaJUN-like3", "ZN333-like-2",  
"GFI1B-like-1", "FOXN4-like-1", "MYC-like-5","AaPOU4-like1", 
 'MYC-like-4',"BGB-like-1") 
goi=Aa_genes$gene_short_name[match(goi,Aa_genes$name)]

data1=data1.subsets$cnidocyte

data1@active.assay='alra'
FeaturePlot(data1,goi,order=T,cols=gene.cp)&NoAxes()&NoLegend()

```
## Fig3c
```{r}
toxins=c('NAS4-like-10','NAS6-like-8','NAS4-like-11','AaNAS4-like','NAS15-like-18','GGH-like-8','NAS15-like-3','NAS4-like-21','NAS6-like-6')
toxins=Aa_genes$gene_short_name[match(toxins,Aa_genes$name)]
  print(
        DotPlot(data1,'RNA', features = toxins,
                              scale.by='radius' , col.min = 0, col.max = 4,  
                              cols = c('lightgrey','red'))+
      RotatedAxis() +FontSize(6,8) +labs(titel='DETFs'))
  # data1@active.assay='RNA'
  data1.subsets$cnidocyte@active.assay='alra'
  pdf('Fig3c.pdf',width = 12,height = 8)
FeaturePlot(data1.subsets$cnidocyte,toxins[c(5:7,1:3)],order=T,cols=c('lightgrey','red'),ncol=3)&NoAxes()&NoLegend()
 dev.off()
```

##Fig3B
```{r, fig.height=8,fig.width=6,warning=F}
goi=c("SOX4-like-1","MYC-like-7",  "PRD13-like-1", "ZN431-like-1", 
 "COT2-like-1","FOSX-like-1", "AaJUN-like-2", 'FOS-like-4','AL-like-1',
"AaJUN-like3", "ZN333-like-2",  
"GFI1B-like-1", "FOXN4-like-1", "MYC-like-5","AaPOU4-like1", 
 'MYC-like-4',"BGB-like-1") 
goi=Aa_genes$gene_short_name[match(goi,Aa_genes$name)]
pdf('Fig.3B.pdf',height = 8,width = 6)
DotPlot(Aa.Alldata,'RNA',goi,group.by = 'ID.separate',cols = c('lightgrey','red'),col.min = 0)+FontSize(8,10) +theme(axis.text.y = element_text(colour = all.clusters.cp),legend.title = element_text(size = 6),legend.text = element_text(size=6))+RotatedAxis()
dev.off()
DotPlot(Aa.Alldata,'RNA',goi,group.by = 'ID.separate',cols = c('lightgrey','red'),col.min = 0)+FontSize(8,10) +theme(axis.text.y = element_text(colour = all.clusters.cp),legend.title = element_text(size = 6),legend.text = element_text(size=6))+RotatedAxis()

```
##fig3A
``` {r, fig.width=6,warning=F}

clust.cp=all.clusters.cp[levels(data1.subsets$cnidocyte)]
clust.cp[3]='green4'
clust.cp[4]='violet'
clust.cp[8]='pink4'

cnido.clust=DimPlot(data1.subsets$cnidocyte,cols=clust.cp)+NoAxes()+NoLegend()
  data1=data1.subsets$cnidocyte
  ids.cluster.library = as.data.frame(table(Idents(data1), data1@meta.data$lifehistory.tissue))
  colnames(ids.cluster.library) = c('ID','Stage','CellCount')
  
  print(cnido.clust+
      ggplot(ids.cluster.library, aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),
                                      x=Stage)) +
      geom_bar(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),
                            x=(Stage)),
               position="fill", stat="identity", width = 0.5)+
      scale_fill_manual(values = clust.cp)+
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(#face="bold", color="#993333", 
        size=8, angle=-45,hjust=0,vjust = 0.5))+
      geom_area(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),
                             x=as.integer(Stage)),
                position="fill", stat="identity",alpha=0.2 , size=.5, colour="white") +
      geom_bar(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),#this re-plots the bars over the area
                            x=(Stage)),
               position="fill", stat="identity", width = 0.5)
  )

```
```{r}
pdf('Fig3A.pdf',height = 6,width = 8)
print(cnido.clust+
      ggplot(ids.cluster.library, aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),
                                      x=Stage)) +
      geom_bar(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),
                            x=(Stage)),
               position="fill", stat="identity", width = 0.5)+
      scale_fill_manual(values = clust.cp)+
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(#face="bold", color="#993333", 
        size=8, angle=-45,hjust=0,vjust = 0.5))+
      geom_area(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),
                             x=as.integer(Stage)),
                position="fill", stat="identity",alpha=0.2 , size=.5, colour="white") +
      geom_bar(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),#this re-plots the bars over the area
                            x=(Stage)),
               position="fill", stat="identity", width = 0.5)
  )
dev.off()
```

##fig3A.inset

``` {r,fig.height=4,fig.width=4}
coi=NULL
for(c in 1:length(levels(data1.subsets$cnidocyte)))
  coi[[c]]=WhichCells(data1.subsets$cnidocyte,idents=levels(data1.subsets$cnidocyte)[c])
names(coi)=levels(data1.subsets$cnidocyte)
pdf('Fig3Ai.pdf',height = 5,width = 5)
DimPlot(Aa.Alldata,cells.highlight = coi,cols.highlight = rev(clust.cp[sort(names(coi))]))&NoAxes()&NoLegend()
dev.off()
```
# Muscle.st : OLIVER
Output of the standard things as with other clusters, but Oliver is looking into the details of this cluster.

```{r }
if(cluster.subsets)
{
  data1=data1.subsets[[1]]
  data1<-SetIdent(data1,value = 'IDs.coarse')
  # data1@reductions = data1@reductions[c(1,4,3,2)]
  print(DimPlot(data1,cols=clust.cp.separate,reduction='umap'))
  
  clusterNames<- read_excel('DataS3.xlsx',
                            sheet = 'Muscle.ST') 
  
    goi = Aa_genes$gene_short_name[match(clusterNames$marker,Aa_genes$name)]
  data1@active.assay='RNA'
  
  #assign cluster ID to the individual libraries
  data1<-ScaleData(data1,features = goi,verbose=F)#, split.by = 'orig.ident') #works with scaled gene values, so must scale all of these first (in case they are not within the VarFeatures set!)
  
  clName = vector()
  
  #generate a matrix of values of each cluster for each gene:
  m=AverageExpression(data1,features=goi,slot='scale.data') #Seurat has a function for this
  
  for (j in 1:length(levels(data1@active.ident))) #for each cluster set
  {
    clName[j]=as.integer(which.max(m$RNA[,j])) #choose the highest value
  }
  sort(clName)#for long lists you might want to know what is missing
  clusterNames$ID[clName]
  
  #use the wanted order from the spreadsheet to re-order the clusters:
  #first order the identities..
  data1@active.ident = factor(data1@active.ident,
                              levels(data1@active.ident)[order(clName)])
  #set the names to your IDs; once the gene list works, it is really easy to then update your cluster names with your excel spreadsheet.
  levels(data1@active.ident) = clusterNames$ID[clName][order(clName)]
  #save the IDs in metadata:
  data1@meta.data$IDs = data1@active.ident
  data1@active.assay='integrated'
  # data1@reductions=data1@reductions[c(1,3,2)]
  print(DimPlot(data1,group.by = c('IDs'),label=F,reduction = 'umap',
                cols = (clust.cp.separate))+NoAxes())
  
  data1.subsets[[1]]=data1
}
```
##### *topGO | st.muscle
```{r, echo=FALSE, eval=F}
if (cluster.subsets)
{
data1=data1.subsets$muscle.st
all.markers <- FindAllMarkers(data1,
                              return.thresh = 0.01,
                              min.pct = 0.2,
                              only.pos = TRUE,
                              max.cells.per.ident = 100,
                              verbose = F)
library(topGO)

resultFis=NULL
topGO.st.muscle=NULL

Unfold <- Aa_annotations %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(`GOs` = strsplit(as.character(`GOs`), ",")) %>% 
  tidyr::unnest(`GOs`) 
geneID2GO <- Unfold %>% split(x = .$`GOs`, f = .$gene_short_name)
geneNames <- names(geneID2GO)
#set dataset:
all.markers
#process data
GOdata.BP.st.muscle = NULL
GOdata.MF.st.muscle = NULL
GOdata.CC.st.muscle = NULL
myInterestingGenes = NULL
allRes_intgenes = NULL

geneList = NULL
for (r in 1:3)
{
  # this takes a really long time:
  for(i in 1:length(unique(all.markers$cluster)))
  {
    #identify the GOI from the DE list
    myInterestingGenes[[i]] <- all.markers$gene[all.markers$cluster==unique(all.markers$cluster)[i]] #list of genes you want to perform GO enrichment for
    geneList[[i]] <- factor(as.integer(geneNames %in% myInterestingGenes[[i]]))
    names(geneList[[i]]) <- geneNames
    GOdata.BP.st.muscle[[i]] <- new("topGOdata",ontology = "BP", allGenes = geneList[[i]],annot = annFUN.gene2GO, gene2GO = geneID2GO)
    GOdata.MF.st.muscle[[i]] <- new("topGOdata",ontology = "MF", allGenes = geneList[[i]],annot = annFUN.gene2GO, gene2GO = geneID2GO)
    GOdata.CC.st.muscle[[i]] <- new("topGOdata",ontology = "CC", allGenes = geneList[[i]],annot = annFUN.gene2GO, gene2GO = geneID2GO)
    go.type=c("Biological Process",'Cellular Compartment','Molecular Function')
    
    if(r==1)
    {GOdata=GOdata.BP.st.muscle}else if(r==2)
    {GOdata=GOdata.CC.st.muscle}else if (r==3)
    {GOdata=GOdata.MF.st.muscle}  
    
    
    #run the test...
    resultFis[[i]] <- runTest(GOdata[[i]], algorithm = "classic", statistic = "fisher")
    pvalFis <- score(resultFis[[i]])
    #filter for only >0.05
    pvalFis = pvalFis[pvalFis>=0.05]
    allRes_intgenes[[r]]<- GenTable(GOdata[[i]], pvalues = resultFis[[i]], orderBy = "pvalues", topNodes=30)
    allRes_intgenes[[r]]$pvalues<-as.numeric(allRes_intgenes[[r]]$pvalues)
    #convert NA values to zero; only if p value is so small it cannot be displayed in r
    allRes_intgenes[[r]][is.na(allRes_intgenes[[r]])]<-0.00000001
    
    #plot GOenrichment 
    david_col=clust.cp.separate
    topGO.st.muscle[[i]]=
      ggplot2::ggplot(allRes_intgenes[[r]], ggplot2::aes(x=(reorder(Term,(-log10(pvalues)))), y=(-log10(pvalues)))) +
      ggplot2::stat_summary(geom = "bar", fun = mean, position = "dodge",
                            col=david_col[i],fill=david_col[i]) +
      ggplot2::coord_flip()+
      ggplot2::xlab(go.type[[r]]) +
      ggplot2::ylab("Enrichment -log10 p-value") +
      ggplot2::labs(title=c("GO enrichment",go.type[[r]]),subtitle=levels(all.markers$cluster)[i])
    
    
    if(r==1)
    {topGO.st.muscle.BP=topGO.st.muscle}else if(r==2)
    {topGO.st.muscle.CC=topGO.st.muscle}else if (r==3)
    {topGO.st.muscle.MF=topGO.st.muscle}  
  }   
} 
save (topGO.st.muscle.BP,topGO.st.muscle.CC,topGO.st.muscle.MF,file='topGO.st.muscle.RData')

rm(GOdata.BP.st.muscle,GOdata,
GOdata.MF.st.muscle ,GOdata.CC.st.muscle,
myInterestingGenes,
allRes_intgenes)
}
```

evaluate the topGO results:
```{r, echo=FALSE, eval=T}
load(file='topGO.st.muscle.RData')
for (i in 1:length(topGO.st.muscle.BP))
  print(topGO.st.muscle.BP[[i]]+
          topGO.st.muscle.MF[[i]]&theme(title = element_text(size=6),axis.text.y = element_text(size=6)))
rm(topGO.st.muscle.MF,topGO.st.muscle.BP,topGO.st.muscle.CC)
```

ran the cytotrace on all possibilities separately. Use this as importation for Monocle: ran also random UMAP seed 10 times via cluster.
#Monocle3

#AllData Monocle ----
```{r}
library(monocle3,quietly = T)
data1=Aa.Alldata
data1@active.assay='integrated'
data1@reductions$umap=data1@reductions$umap.int

cds <- SeuratWrappers::as.cell_data_set(data1)
cds <- cluster_cells(cds = cds, reduction_method = "UMAP",
                     resolution = 0.001) #saved 0.001
cds <- learn_graph(cds, 
                   use_partition = T, 
                   close_loop=T)

cds.Alldata = cds
save(cds.Alldata,file = 'Monocle.Alldata.newnames.RObj')
```
```{r, fig.height=8}
if(!(exists('cds.Alldata')))
load(file = 'Monocle.Alldata.newnames.RObj')
#* plot the results on the cluster graph. 
monocle3::plot_cells(cds.Alldata, 
                               color_cells_by = "ID.separate",
                               label_cell_groups=F, 
                               label_leaves=F,
                               label_branch_points=F,
                               label_roots = F,
                               trajectory_graph_color = 'black',
                               trajectory_graph_segment_size = 2,
                               cell_size = 1,
                               cell_stroke = 0,
)+ scale_color_manual(values = all.clusters.cp)

monocle3::plot_cells(cds.Alldata, 
             color_cells_by = "cytoTRACE.alldata",
             label_cell_groups=F, 
             label_leaves=F,
             label_branch_points=F,
             label_roots = F,
             trajectory_graph_color = 'cyan',
             trajectory_graph_segment_size = 1,
             cell_size = 1,
             cell_stroke = 0,
  )+viridis::scale_color_viridis(option = 'A',discrete = F,direction = -1,alpha = 0.5)
```
#Fig 8A
```{r}
pdf('Fig8A.pdf',width=8,height = 6)
monocle3::plot_cells(cds.Alldata, 
             color_cells_by = "cytoTRACE.alldata",
             label_cell_groups=F, 
             label_leaves=F,
             label_branch_points=F,
             label_roots = F,
             trajectory_graph_color = 'cyan',
             trajectory_graph_segment_size = 1,
             cell_size = 1,
             cell_stroke = 0,
  )+viridis::scale_color_viridis(option = 'A',discrete = F,direction = -1,alpha = 0.5)
```

## Celltype Tree Coarse
```{r}
library(stats)
library(ape)

# calculate a matrix of pseudobulk expression 
data1.ave <- Seurat::AverageExpression(Aa.Alldata,group.by = 'IDs',assays = 'RNA')
distance_matrix <- dist(t(data1.ave$RNA), method = "euclidean")
nj.tree <- nj(distance_matrix)

nj.boot.tree <- boot.phylo(nj.tree, t(data1.ave$RNA), FUN = function(xx) nj(dist(xx)), B = 1000)

# dividing by 10 to have a score between 0-100
nj.tree$node.label <- nj.boot.tree/10
# rounding because i don't want to plot decimal numbers
nj.tree$node.label <- round(nj.tree$node.label)
plot.phylo(nj.tree, type = "tidy", show.node.label = TRUE, label.offset = 0.1, rotate.tree = 90,tip.color = clust.cp.separate)
title(main="Cell tree | bootstrap replicates: 1000")


```
# image results: 
## UMAP library and cluster

```{r SubetPlots, eval=T}
clust.cp=clust.cp.separate
for (i in 1:length(names (data1.subsets)))
{
  data1=data1.subsets[[i]]
  print(
    DimPlot(data1,group.by = 'orig.ident',
            cols = LibCP) + NoAxes()+labs(title = 'Library | ID',subtitle = 'integrated')&
      DimPlot(data1, label = T,label.size = 5, repel = T,
              cols = clust.cp)+NoLegend()+NoAxes()+
      labs(title = names(data1.subsets)[i],subtitle = i)
  )
  
}
```

## Distribution barplots and cluster

```{r, eval=T,warning=FALSE,message=FALSE}

clust.cp=clust.cp.separate
for (i in 1:length(names (data1.subsets)))
{ 
  data1=data1.subsets[[i]]
  ids.cluster.library = as.data.frame(table(Idents(data1), data1@meta.data$orig.ident))
  colnames(ids.cluster.library) = c('ID','Library','CellCount')
  
  print(
    DimPlot(data1, label = F,label.size = 5, repel = T,
            cols = clust.cp)+NoLegend()+NoAxes()+
      labs(title = names(data1.subsets)[i],subtitle = i) +
      ggplot(ids.cluster.library, aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),
                                      x=Library)) +
      geom_bar(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),
                            x=(Library)),
               position="stack", stat="identity", width = 0.5)+
      scale_fill_manual(values = clust.cp)+
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(#face="bold", color="#993333", 
        size=8, angle=-45,hjust=0,vjust = 0.5))+
      geom_area(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),
                             x=as.integer(Library)),
                position="stack", stat="identity",alpha=0.2 , size=.5, colour="white") +
      geom_bar(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount),#this re-plots the bars over the area
                            x=(Library)),
               position="stack", stat="identity", width = 0.5)+labs(title = names(data1.subsets)[i],subtitle = i)
  )
}
```


## DEG lists for subsets
- run once the refinement is finished and name are assigned...

```{r DEGs, warning=FALSE}
if(cluster.subsets)
{
  if (!exists('markers'))
    load(file = 'AllData.integrated.subsets.newnames.markers.RObj')
  if (!exists('markers.TF'))
    load(file = 'AllData.integrated.subsets.newnames.TF.markers.RObj')
  # markers = NULL
  # markers.TF = NULL# didn't work; off for now
  for (i in 1:length(names (data1.subsets)))
  {
    data1=data1.subsets[[i]]
    data1@active.assay='RNA'
    all.markers <- FindAllMarkers(data1,
                                  logfc.threshold = 0.6,
                                  # features = data1@misc$var.genes,
                                  return.thresh = 0.001,
                                  min.pct = 0.3,
                                  only.pos = TRUE, 
                                  max.cells.per.ident = 200,verbose=F)
    
    all.markers[,8:12] = 'NA'
    names(all.markers)[8:12]=names(Aa_genes)[c(1,3:6)]
    # add GO terms associated with this list:
    for (j in 1:length(levels(data1@active.ident))) # 
    {
      x=all.markers[as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j)),7]
      x2=Aa_genes[match(x,Aa_genes$gene_short_name),c(1,3:6)]
      all.markers[as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j)),8:12]<-x2
    }  
    markers[[i]] = all.markers 
    
    #also for transcription factors only: this did not work...
    all.markers_TF <- FindAllMarkers(data1,
                                     # logfc.threshold = 0.4,
                                     features = intersect(AaTF_list,rownames(data1)),
                                     min.pct = 0.01,
                                     only.pos = TRUE,
                                     max.cells.per.ident = 200,
                                     return.thresh = 0.001,verbose=F)
    
    all.markers_TF[,8:12] = 'NA'
    names(all.markers_TF)[8:12]=names(Aa_genes)[c(1,3:6)]
    # add GO terms associated with this list:
    for (j in 1:length(levels(data1@active.ident))) #
    {
      x=all.markers_TF[as.numeric(all.markers_TF$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers_TF$cluster)==j)),7]
      x2=Aa_genes[match(x,Aa_genes$gene_short_name),c(1,3:6)]
      all.markers_TF[as.numeric(all.markers_TF$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers_TF$cluster)==j)),8:12]<-x2
    }
    markers.TF[[i]] = all.markers_TF
  }
  # View(markers[[i]])
  names(markers) = names(data1.subsets)
  names(markers.TF) = names(data1.subsets)

  save(markers,file = 'AllData.integrated.subsets.newnames.markers.RObj')
  save(markers.TF,file = 'AllData.integrated.subsets.newnames.TF.markers.RObj')
}
```

plot the DEG lists
```{r}
 for (s in c(1:length(names (data1.subsets))))
  {
    list = NULL
    for (c in  1:length(levels(data1.subsets[[s]]@active.ident)))
    {
      x=markers[[s]][as.numeric(markers[[s]]$cluster)==c,][1:min(5,length(which(as.numeric(markers[[s]]$cluster)==c))),7]
      list=c(list,x)
    }
    
    print(DotPlot(data1.subsets[[s]],'RNA', features = unique(list),scale.by='radius' , col.min = 0, cols = c('lightgrey','darkred'))+ RotatedAxis() +FontSize(6,8)+ labs(title=names(data1.subsets)[s])+theme(axis.text.y = element_text(colour=all.clusters.cp[levels(data1.subsets[[s]])],size=8),legend.position = 'bottom'))
}
```
Plot the DETF lists
```{r}
 for (s in c(1:length(names (data1.subsets))))
  {
    list = NULL
    for (c in  1:length(levels(data1.subsets[[s]]@active.ident)))
    {
      x=markers.TF[[s]][as.numeric(markers.TF[[s]]$cluster)==c,][1:min(5,length(which(as.numeric(markers.TF[[s]]$cluster)==c))),7]
      list=c(list,x)
    }
    
    print(DotPlot(data1.subsets[[s]],'RNA', features = unique(list),
                              scale.by='radius' , col.min = 0, col.max = 4,  
                              cols = c('lightgrey','darkred'))+
      RotatedAxis() +FontSize(6,8)+ labs(title=names(data1.subsets)[s]))
}
```

### Cytotrace on subsets
```{r eval=F}
# load(file='AllData.integrated2.subsets.cyto.RObj') #saved here.
{
  for (i in c(1:length(names (data1.subsets)))) 
  {
    data1 = data1.subsets[[i]]
    print(FeaturePlot(data1,'cytoTRACE.subset', order=T, reduction = 'umap', cols = alpha(rev(brewer.pal(11 , "Spectral" )),0.5),label = T)+labs(title =names(data1.subsets[i]))+NoAxes()+NoLegend())
  }
}
```

#### save everything:
```{r SAVE.subsets, eval=F}
# save(data1.subsets,file = 'AllData.integrated2.subsets.RObj')
  save(data1.subsets,file = 'AllData.integrated.subsets.newnames.RObj')
```

# Add ID.separate to Alldata:
```{r}
if(cluster.subsets)
{
  cl.order=NULL
  cl.ind = NULL
  Aa.Alldata$IDs = Aa.Alldata@active.ident 
  Aa.Alldata$ID.separate = as.character(Aa.Alldata$IDs)
  for (i in c(1:5,8:10))#1:length(names (data1.subsets)))
  {
    coi=NULL
    coi=colnames(data1.subsets[[i]])
    Aa.Alldata$ID.separate[coi] = as.character(data1.subsets[[i]]@active.ident[coi])
    cl.order = c(cl.order,levels(data1.subsets[[i]]))
  }
  cl.ind = match(cl.order,levels(as.factor(Aa.Alldata$ID.separate))) 
  
  Aa.Alldata$ID.separate = as.factor(Aa.Alldata$ID.separate)
  Aa.Alldata$ID.separate = factor(Aa.Alldata$ID.separate,levels(Aa.Alldata$ID.separate)[cl.ind])
  
}
```

```{r, fig.height=12,eval=T}
print(DimPlot(Aa.Alldata,group.by = 'ID.separate',cols=all.clusters.cp)+NoAxes()+theme(legend.position = 'bottom'))
```
##Fig.2B

```{r, fig.height=12}

clust.cp=all.clusters.cp
data1=SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value = 'ID.separate')
ids.cluster.library = as.data.frame(table(Idents(data1), data1@meta.data$lifehistory.tissue))
colnames(ids.cluster.library) = c('ID','Stage','CellCount')

print(
  ggplot(ids.cluster.library, aes(fill=ID, y= CellCount,
                                  x=Stage)) +
    geom_bar(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= (CellCount),
                          x=(Stage)),
             position="fill", stat="identity", width = 0.5)+
    scale_fill_manual(values = clust.cp)+
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(#face="bold", color="#993333", 
      size=8, angle=-45,hjust=0,vjust = 0.5))+
    geom_area(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= (CellCount),
                           x=as.integer(Stage)),
              position="fill", stat="identity",alpha=0.2 , size=.5, colour="white") +
    geom_bar(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= (CellCount),#this re-plots the bars over the area
                          x=(Stage)),
             position="fill", stat="identity", width = 0.5)+labs(title = 'All cluster identities')+theme(legend.position = 'none')
)
```
```{r}
pdf('Fig.2B.pdf',width = 6,height = 6)
ggplot(ids.cluster.library, aes(fill=ID, y= CellCount,
                                  x=Stage)) +
    geom_bar(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= (CellCount),
                          x=(Stage)),
             position="fill", stat="identity", width = 0.5)+
    scale_fill_manual(values = clust.cp)+
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(#face="bold", color="#993333", 
      size=8, angle=-45,hjust=0,vjust = 0.5))+
    geom_area(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= (CellCount),
                           x=as.integer(Stage)),
              position="fill", stat="identity",alpha=0.2 , size=.5, colour="white") +
    geom_bar(mapping =aes(fill=ID, y= (CellCount),#this re-plots the bars over the area
                          x=(Stage)),
             position="fill", stat="identity", width = 0.5)+labs(title = 'All cluster identities')+theme(legend.position = 'none')
dev.off()
```
```{r}
save(Aa.Alldata,file='Aa.Alldata.newnames.RObj')
```

#### medusa-specific cell types:
```{r}
#generate indices for medusa specific cell types
data1=SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value='ID.separate')

# maybe use the idents table:
ids.cluster.library = as.data.frame(table(Idents(data1), data1@meta.data$lifehistory))
colnames(ids.cluster.library) = c('ID','Lifehistory','CellCount')

ggplot(ids.cluster.library, aes(fill=ID, y= (CellCount-1),
                                x=Lifehistory)) +
    geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width = 0.5)+
    scale_fill_manual(values = all.clusters.cp)+
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(#face="bold", color="#993333", 
        size=8, angle=-45,hjust=0,vjust = 0.5))

cloi=ids.cluster.library$ID[which(ids.cluster.library$CellCount[ids.cluster.library$Lifehistory=='polyp'] <= 3)]
mcloi=ids.cluster.library$ID[which(ids.cluster.library$CellCount[!(ids.cluster.library$Lifehistory=='polyp' | ids.cluster.library$Lifehistory=='strobila')] <= 3)]

cl.oi=setdiff(levels(data1),cloi)
coi.medusa=WhichCells(data1,idents=cloi)
coi.all=WhichCells(data1,idents=cl.oi)
```

# image DEGs on full dataset
```{r, warning=F}
cluster.subsets = T
if(cluster.subsets)
{
  # Here write script to pull out the top 5 DEG's from the subsets and the cluster DEG's and plot onto the fully annotated clustered AllData
  if (!exists("Aa.Alldata"))
    load(file='AaAlldata.integrated.AAUR2.Robj')
  if (!exists("all.markers.Alldata"))
    load(file = 'AllData.integrated2.markers.RObj')
  if (!exists("data1.subsets"))
    load(file='AllData.integrated2.subsets.RObj')
  if (!exists("markers"))
    load(file='AllData.integrated2.subsets.markers.RObj')
  
  
  DEG.plot.all=NULL
  
  for (s in c(1:length(names (data1.subsets))))
    # s=2
  {
    list = NULL
    for (c in  1:length(levels(data1.subsets[[s]]@active.ident)))
    {
      x=markers[[s]][as.numeric(markers[[s]]$cluster)==c,][1:min(5,length(which(as.numeric(markers[[s]]$cluster)==c))),7]
      list=c(list,x)
    }
    
    DEG.plot.all[[s]]=DotPlot(Aa.Alldata,'RNA', #features = unique(list),
                              unique(c(list,all.markers.Alldata$gene[which(all.markers.Alldata$cluster == 
                                                                             names (data1.subsets)[s])][1:10])),
                              group.by = 'ID.separate',
                              scale.by='radius' , col.min = 0, col.max = 4,  
                              cols = c('lightgrey','darkred'))+
      RotatedAxis() +FontSize(6,8)+ labs(title=names(data1.subsets)[s])+theme(axis.text.y = element_text(colour=all.clusters.cp,size=8),legend.position = 'bottom')
  }
  for (s in c(1:length(names (data1.subsets))))
  {
    print(DEG.plot.all[[s]]) 
  }    
  # save(DEG.plot.all,file='DEG.onAll.Robj') #generates a crazy large file; in R is only 6.1MB
  
}
```
All of the DEGs ploted on the full dataset, with also top 10 of population markers.




```{r}
DETF.plot=NULL
 for (s in c(1:length(names (data1.subsets))))
  {
    list = NULL
    for (c in  1:length(levels(data1.subsets[[s]]@active.ident)))
    {
      x=markers.TF[[s]][as.numeric(markers.TF[[s]]$cluster)==c,][1:min(15,length(which(as.numeric(markers.TF[[s]]$cluster)==c))),7]
      list=c(list,x)
    }
    
    DETF.plot[[s]]=DotPlot(Aa.Alldata,'RNA', features = unique(list),
                              group.by = 'ID.separate',
                              scale.by='radius' , col.min = 0, col.max = 4,  
                              cols = c('lightgrey','darkred'),scale=T)+
      RotatedAxis() +FontSize(6,8)+ labs(title=names(data1.subsets)[s],subtitle = 'DETFs')+theme(axis.text.y = element_text(colour=all.clusters.cp,size=8))
  }
  for (s in c(1:length(names (data1.subsets))))
  {
    print(DETF.plot[[s]]) 
  }
```

These data suggest some mis-placements in the clustering (fuzzy boundaries and/or doublets)
*Questions that arise:*
1) Overlap with mature cnidocyte / mechanosensory. **Are there two separate things here?**
2) The cross cell type contamination: **doublets or cell decisions?**
3) Are n1.LWA and n1.2 neurons or digestive cells or doublets? 
- n1.2 genes are clearly in the dig. cluster and n1.LWA clearly has a 'polyp' signature
4) Mucin gland clearly has stMuscle contamination AND cnidocyte/muscle (mu.unchar.3)
- doublets should be looked at more carefully...
5) Inner cell layer has clear digestive gland overlaps; likely these originate here. **is this retained with the new approach?**
7) outer signal is strongest in cnidocytes / n2 neurons / mucin gland / striated muscle
8) n1.HLH5medusa has a st.muscle signature: **doublet?** This is of course feasible biologically becauase these are likely the medusa swimming moter neurons!

**Conclusions:** 
a) n1 + digestive gland clade derived from inner cell layer and shared across life history stages

#image cluster on full data
Not run...
```{r eval=T}
#* not run
#image results
clust.cp=clust.cp.separate
for (s in 1:length(names (data1.subsets)))
{
  data1=data1.subsets[[s]]
  cellID = NULL
  for (j in 1:length(levels(data1)))#unique(data2$seurat_clusters)))
    cellID[[j]] = WhichCells(data1, idents = levels(data1)[j])
  names(cellID)=levels(data1)
  
  print (DimPlot(Aa.Alldata, cells.highlight = cellID,
                 cols.highlight = alpha(clust.cp, 0.8),
                 label = F,pt.size = 1) +NoAxes())
  
}
```


```{r eval=F}
#  Plot the top 4 'marker' genes for each population on the subsets:
load(file = 'AllData.integrated2.markers.RObj')
data1=Aa.Alldata
for (i in 1:length(names (data1.subsets)))#i=19 fails at res 0.2 with fine clustering
{
  goi=all.markers.Alldata$gene[as.numeric(all.markers.Alldata$cluster)==i][1:4] 
  # data1.subsets[[i]]@active.assay = 'RNA'
  print(FeaturePlot(data1.subsets[[i]],goi,order=T,cols=gene.cp,label = T)&NoLegend()&NoAxes())
  # print(
  # DotPlot(Aa.Alldata,features=goi,idents = levels(Aa.Alldata)[i],split.by = 'orig.ident',cols=LibCP)
  # )
}

# save (data1.subsets,file = "subsets.single.1403.RObj")
```



```{r, fig.height=12}
data1=SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value = 'ID.separate')
clust.cp=all.clusters.cp
ids.cluster.sample = as.data.frame(table(Idents(data1), data1@meta.data$lifehistory))
colnames(ids.cluster.sample) = c('ID', 'Lifehistory.Stage', 'CellCount')
ggplot(ids.cluster.sample, aes(fill = ID, y = CellCount,
                               x = Lifehistory.Stage)) +
  geom_bar(
    mapping = aes(
      fill = ID,
      y = (CellCount),
      x = (Lifehistory.Stage)
    ),
    position = "fill",
    stat = "identity",
    width = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = clust.cp) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(
    #face="bold", color="#993333",
    size = 8,
    angle = -45,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0.5
  )) +
  geom_area(
    mapping = aes(
      fill = ID,
      y = (CellCount),
      x = as.integer(Lifehistory.Stage)
    ),
    position = "fill",
    stat = "identity",
    alpha = 0.2 ,
    size = .5,
    colour = "white"
  ) +
  geom_bar(
    mapping = aes(
      fill = ID,
      y = (CellCount),
      #this re-plots the bars over the area
      x = (Lifehistory.Stage)
    ),
    position = "fill",
    stat = "identity",
    width = 0.5
  ) +
  ggtitle("Distribution of cell types over lifehistory stage")+
  theme(legend.position = 'NONE')
```

```{r}
data1=SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value = 'ID.separate')
data1=subset(data1,idents=levels(data1)[c(1:3,24:length(levels(data1)))])
clust.cp=all.clusters.cp[c(1:3,24:length(levels(SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value = 'ID.separate'))))]
ids.cluster.sample = as.data.frame(table(Idents(data1), data1@meta.data$lifehistory))
colnames(ids.cluster.sample) = c('ID', 'Lifehistory.Stage', 'CellCount')
ggplot(ids.cluster.sample, aes(fill = ID, y = CellCount,
                               x = Lifehistory.Stage)) +
  geom_bar(
    mapping = aes(
      fill = ID,
      y = (CellCount),
      x = (Lifehistory.Stage)
    ),
    position = "stack",
    stat = "identity",
    width = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = clust.cp) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(
    #face="bold", color="#993333",
    size = 8,
    angle = -45,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0.5
  )) +
  geom_area(
    mapping = aes(
      fill = ID,
      y = (CellCount),
      x = as.integer(Lifehistory.Stage)
    ),
    position = "stack",
    stat = "identity",
    alpha = 0.2 ,
    size = .5,
    colour = "white"
  ) +
  geom_bar(
    mapping = aes(
      fill = ID,
      y = (CellCount),
      #this re-plots the bars over the area
      x = (Lifehistory.Stage)
    ),
    position = "stack",
    stat = "identity",
    width = 0.5
  ) +
  ggtitle("Distribution of cell types over lifehistory stage")
``` 

# All IDs DEG plot from all.markers
```{r, warning=FALSE}
data1=SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value = 'ID.separate')
   data1@active.assay='RNA'
    all.markers.allidents <- FindAllMarkers(data1,
                                  logfc.threshold = 1,
                                  # features = data1@misc$var.genes,
                                  return.thresh = 0.0001,
                                  min.pct = 0.5,
                                  only.pos = TRUE, 
                                  verbose=F)
    
    all.markers.allidents[,8:12] = 'NA'
    names(all.markers.allidents)[8:12]=names(Aa_genes)[c(1,3:6)]
    # add GO terms associated with this list:
    for (j in 1:length(levels(data1@active.ident))) # 
    {
      x=all.markers.allidents[as.numeric(all.markers.allidents$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers.allidents$cluster)==j)),7]
      x2=Aa_genes[match(x,Aa_genes$gene_short_name),c(1,3:6)]
      all.markers.allidents[as.numeric(all.markers.allidents$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers.allidents$cluster)==j)),8:12]<-x2
    }  
    
    #also for transcription factors only: this did not work...
    all.markers.TF.allidents <- FindAllMarkers(data1,
                                     logfc.threshold = 0.2,
                                     features = intersect(AaTF_list,rownames(data1)),
                                     min.pct = 0.05,
                                     only.pos = TRUE,
                                     max.cells.per.ident = 200,
                                     return.thresh = 0.001,verbose=F)
    
    all.markers.TF.allidents[,8:12] = 'NA'
    names(all.markers.TF.allidents)[8:12]=names(Aa_genes)[c(1,3:6)]
    # add GO terms associated with this list:
    for (j in 1:length(levels(data1@active.ident))) #
    {
      x=all.markers.TF.allidents[as.numeric(all.markers.TF.allidents$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers.TF.allidents$cluster)==j)),7]
      x2=Aa_genes[match(x,Aa_genes$gene_short_name),c(1,3:6)]
      all.markers.TF.allidents[as.numeric(all.markers.TF.allidents$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers.TF.allidents$cluster)==j)),8:12]<-x2
    }    
    
```

```{r, warning=FALSE}
list = NULL
    for (c in  1:length(levels(data1@active.ident)))
    {
      x=all.markers.allidents[as.numeric(all.markers.allidents$cluster)==c,][1:min(5,length(which(as.numeric(all.markers.allidents$cluster)==c))),7]
      list=c(list,x)
    }
        list2 = NULL
    for (c in  1:length(levels(data1@active.ident)))
    {
      x=all.markers.TF.allidents[as.numeric(all.markers.TF.allidents$cluster)==c,][1:min(5,length(which(as.numeric(all.markers.TF.allidents$cluster)==c))),7]
      list2=c(list2,x)
    }
         
    print(DotPlot(data1,'RNA', features = unique(list),
                              scale.by='radius' , col.min = 0, col.max = 4,  
                              cols = c('lightgrey','darkred'))+
      RotatedAxis() +FontSize(6,8) +labs(title='DEG')+theme(legend.position = 'bottom',legend.title = element_text(size=8),axis.text.y = element_text(colour=all.clusters.cp,size=8)))
      print(
        DotPlot(data1,'RNA', features = unique(list2),
                              scale.by='radius' , col.min = 0, col.max = 4,  
                              cols = c('lightgrey','darkred'))+
      RotatedAxis() +FontSize(6,8) +labs(title ='DETFs')+theme(axis.text.y = element_text(colour=all.clusters.cp,size=8)))
```

```{r}
save (all.markers.TF.allidents,all.markers.allidents,file='all.idents.markers.newnames.RData')
```


# Feature plots
```{r,fig.height=12,warning=FALSE,message=FALSE}
goi = c('twist','foxa2-like-1')
in.situ.genes=readxl::read_excel('Aurelia_genes_cloned.xlsx')
goi=genes$gene_short_name[match(in.situ.genes$`Gene ID`,genes$geneID)]
DotPlot(Aa.Alldata,'RNA',goi,group.by = 'ID.separate',cols=c('lightgrey','darkred'),col.min = 0)&RotatedAxis()&theme(axis.text.y = element_text(colour=all.clusters.cp,size=8),legend.position = 'bottom')
```
```{r}

```

```{r}
 data1$orig.ident = droplevels(as.factor(data1$orig.ident))
    ids.cluster.library = as.data.frame(table(Idents(data1), data1@meta.data$orig.ident))
    colnames(ids.cluster.library) = c('ID','Library','CellCount')


    print(ggplot(ids.cluster.library, aes(fill=ID, y= log(CellCount), x=Library)) + 
      geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity")  +scale_fill_manual(values = clust.cp)+
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(#face="bold", color="#993333", 
        size=8, angle=-45,hjust=0,vjust = 0.5)))
    
```
# General DEG 

```{r}
data1@active.assay='RNA'
    all.markers <- FindAllMarkers(data1,
                                  logfc.threshold = 1,
                                  # features = data1@misc$var.genes,
                                  return.thresh = 0.001,
                                  min.pct = 0.3,
                                  only.pos = TRUE, 
                                  verbose=F)
    
    all.markers[,8:12] = 'NA'
    names(all.markers)[8:12]=names(Aa_genes)[c(1,3:6)]
    # add GO terms associated with this list:
    for (j in 1:length(levels(data1@active.ident))) # 
    {
      x=all.markers[as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j)),7]
      x2=Aa_genes[match(x,Aa_genes$gene_short_name),c(1,3:6)]
      all.markers[as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j)),8:12]<-x2
    }  
      all.markers.TF <- FindAllMarkers(data1,
                                  logfc.threshold = 0.4,
                                  features = AaTF_list,
                                  return.thresh = 0.001,
                                  min.pct = 0.05,
                                  only.pos = TRUE, 
                                  verbose=F)
    
    all.markers.TF[,8:12] = 'NA'
    names(all.markers.TF)[8:12]=names(Aa_genes)[c(1,3:6)]
    # add GO terms associated with this list:
    for (j in 1:length(levels(data1@active.ident))) # 
    {
      x=all.markers.TF[as.numeric(all.markers.TF$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers.TF$cluster)==j)),7]
      x2=Aa_genes[match(x,Aa_genes$gene_short_name),c(1,3:6)]
      all.markers.TF[as.numeric(all.markers.TF$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers.TF$cluster)==j)),8:12]<-x2
    }  
    
```



```{r, warning=FALSE}
list = NULL
    for (c in  1:length(levels(data1@active.ident)))
    {
      x=all.markers[as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==c,][1:min(5,length(which(as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==c))),7]
      list=c(list,x)
    }
        list2 = NULL
    for (c in  1:length(levels(data1@active.ident)))
    {
      x=all.markers.TF[as.numeric(all.markers.TF$cluster)==c,][1:min(5,length(which(as.numeric(all.markers.TF$cluster)==c))),7]
      list2=c(list2,x)
    }
    
    print(DotPlot(data1,'alra', features = unique(list),
                              scale.by='radius' , col.min = 0, col.max = 4,  
                              cols = c('lightgrey','darkred'))+
      RotatedAxis() +FontSize(6,8) +labs(title='DEG')+theme(legend.position = 'bottom',legend.title = element_text(size=8),axis.text.y = element_text(colour=all.clusters.cp,size=8)))
      print(
        DotPlot(all.neuroglandular,'alra', features = unique(list2),
                              scale.by='radius' , col.min = 0, col.max = 4,  
                              cols = c('lightgrey','darkred'))+
      RotatedAxis() +FontSize(6,8) +labs(title ='DETFs')+theme(axis.text.y = element_text(colour=all.clusters.cp[levels(all.neuroglandular)],size=8)))
```

```{r,eval=FALSE,fig.height=12}
data1<-BuildClusterTree(SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value='ID.separate'),
                        # assay = 'integrated',features = rownames(Aa.Alldata@assays$integrated))#,
                        # features = AaTF_list) # not useful
                        dims = 1:22)
# print(PlotClusterTree(data1,tip.color = all.clusters.cp,direction = 'rightwards'))
# data1@tools$BuildClusterTreeDims=data1@tools$BuildClusterTree
ape::plot.phylo(data1@tools$BuildClusterTree,type='tidy',no.margin = T,use.edge.length = F,tip.color = all.clusters.cp)
# ape::cophyloplot(data1@tools$BuildClusterTree,data1@tools$BuildClusterTreeDims)#didn't work
ape::plot.phylo(data1@tools$BuildClusterTree,type='fan',no.margin = T,use.edge.length = F,tip.color = all.clusters.cp)
ape::plot.phylo(data1@tools$BuildClusterTree,type='fan',no.margin = T,use.edge.length = T,tip.color = all.clusters.cp)

```

```{r,eval=FALSE,fig.height=12}
data1<-BuildClusterTree(SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value='ID.separate'),
                        # assay = 'integrated',features = rownames(Aa.Alldata@assays$integrated))#,
                        features = AaTF_list) # not useful
                        # dims = 1:22)
# print(PlotClusterTree(data1,tip.color = all.clusters.cp,direction = 'rightwards'))
# data1@tools$BuildClusterTreeDims=data1@tools$BuildClusterTree
ape::plot.phylo(data1@tools$BuildClusterTree,type='tidy',no.margin = T,use.edge.length = F,tip.color = all.clusters.cp)
# ape::cophyloplot(data1@tools$BuildClusterTree,data1@tools$BuildClusterTreeDims)#didn't work
ape::plot.phylo(data1@tools$BuildClusterTree,type='fan',no.margin = T,use.edge.length = F,tip.color = all.clusters.cp)
ape::plot.phylo(data1@tools$BuildClusterTree,type='fan',no.margin = T,use.edge.length = T,tip.color = all.clusters.cp)

```

#Fig1E -----
```{r,eval=FALSE}
data1=SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value='ID.separate')
    all.markers <- FindAllMarkers(data1,asssay='alra',
                                  logfc.threshold = 1.4,
                                  features = AaTF_list,
                                  return.thresh = 0.01,
                                  min.pct = 0.1,
                                  only.pos = TRUE, 
                                  max.cells.per.ident = 50,verbose=F)
    
    all.markers[,8:12] = 'NA'
    names(all.markers)[8:12]=names(Aa_genes)[c(1,3:6)]
    # add GO terms associated with this list:
    for (j in 1:length(levels(data1@active.ident))) # 
    {
      x=all.markers[as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j)),7]
      x2=Aa_genes[match(x,Aa_genes$gene_short_name),c(1,3:6)]
      all.markers[as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j,][1:length(which(as.numeric(all.markers$cluster)==j)),8:12]<-x2
    }  
         all.markers.all.celltype=all.markers
save(all.markers.all.celltype,file='allcelltype.DETF')
```


```{r, fig.height=8,warning=FALSE}
Aa.Alldata=SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value='ID.separate')
load(file='allcelltype.DETF')
#filter for p.value adjusted:
all.markers.all.celltype.filter = all.markers.all.celltype[all.markers.all.celltype$p_val_adj<=0.001,]
# neur.ids=c(47:64)
list = NULL
    for (c in (1:length(levels(Aa.Alldata@active.ident))))
    {
      x=all.markers.all.celltype.filter[as.numeric(all.markers.all.celltype.filter$cluster)==c,][1:min(3,length(which(as.numeric(all.markers.all.celltype.filter$cluster)==c))),7]
      list=c(list,x)
    }

    
    AllDETF.alldata=DotPlot(SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value='ID.separate'),'RNA', features = unique(c(list,'ashc.2')),scale.by='size' , col.min = 0, cols = c('lightgrey','darkred'))+
      RotatedAxis() +FontSize(6,8) +labs(title='Top 3 DETFs / cell sub-type',subtitle = 'adj.p-val <= 0.001')+theme(legend.position = 'bottom',legend.title = element_text(size=8),legend.text = element_text(size=8),axis.text.y = element_text(colour=all.clusters.cp,size=9))
    
    print(AllDETF.alldata)
```

```{r}
pdf('Fig1E.pdf',width = 12,height = 6.5)
DotPlot(SetIdent(Aa.Alldata,value='ID.separate'),'RNA', features = unique(c(list)),scale.by='size' ,dot.min = 0.01 , col.min = 0, cols = c('grey90','darkred'))+
      RotatedAxis() +FontSize(6,6) +labs(title='Top 3 DETFs / cell sub-type',subtitle = 'adj.p-val <= 0.001')+theme(legend.position = 'bottom',legend.title = element_text(size=6),legend.text = element_text(size=6))
dev.off()
```
